content:
✨ react-datepicker | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide developers with a flexible and easy-to-use date and time selection component within React applications.
✨ Key Features: • Reusable Datepicker component for React • Supports date and time selection • Localization support • Custom header configuration • Integration with date-fns and moment.js
📖 Summary: React Date Picker is a versatile and reusable date selection component for React applications. It offers extensive customization options, including time selection, localization, and custom header support, making it easy to integrate date and time picking functionality into your UI.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
